mapper.select: SELECT o.id AS id, o.no AS no, s.name AS supplierName, o.supplier_id AS supplierId, o.account_id AS accountId, o.order_time AS orderTime, o.create_by AS createBy, o.total_count AS totalCount, o.in_count AS inCount, o.return_count AS returnCount, o.total_price AS totalPrice, o.total_tax_price AS totalTaxPrice, o.deposit_price AS depositPrice, o.status AS status, GROUP_CONCAT( CONCAT( p.name ) SEPARATOR ',' ) AS productNames FROM erp_purchase_order o LEFT JOIN erp_purchase_order_items i ON i.order_no = o.no LEFT JOIN erp_supplier s ON s.id = o.supplier_id LEFT JOIN erp_account a ON a.id = o.account_id LEFT JOIN erp_product p on p.id = i.product_id ${ew.getCustomSqlSegment} GROUP BY o.id ORDER BY o.no DESC;
